conjecture_title: Open problem: MIS complexity in even-hole-free graphs
paper_title: Maximum independent sets in (pyramid, even hole)-free graphs
summary: The complexity of maximum independent set in even-hole-free graphs (polynomial-time vs. NP-hard) remains open. Significant partial progress has been made: Abrishami et al. (arXiv:2005.05042, 2020) give a polynomial-time MWIS algorithm for (theta, pyramid, prism, turtle)-free graphs, subsuming the (pyramid, even hole)-free result. More decisively, Chudnovsky, Gartland, Hajebi, Lokshtanov, and Spirkl (arXiv:2407.08927, 2024) prove that every n-vertex even-hole-free graph has tree independence number at most c·log^{10}(n), yielding a quasi-polynomial time algorithm for MWIS across the full even-hole-free class—a major advance that nonetheless leaves the polynomial vs. NP-hard question unresolved.

since_posted.title: Graphs with polynomially many minimal separators
since_posted.authors: Tara Abrishami, Maria Chudnovsky, Cemil Dibek, Stéphan Thomassé, Nicolas Trotignon
since_posted.claim: Proves that (theta, pyramid, prism, turtle)-free graphs have at most |V(G)|^{18} minimal separators, yielding a polynomial-time MWIS algorithm for this class (which implies polynomial time for (pyramid, even hole)-free graphs, a proper subclass of even-hole-free graphs).

since_posted.title: Tree Independence Number IV. Even-hole-free Graphs
since_posted.authors: Maria Chudnovsky, Peter Gartland, Sepehr Hajebi, Daniel Lokshtanov, Sophie Spirkl
since_posted.claim: Proves that every n-vertex even-hole-free graph has tree independence number at most c·log^{10}(n), implying MWIS is solvable in quasi-polynomial time for the entire even-hole-free class.

internal_refs_verified.note: Confirmed: paper proves polynomially many minimal separators for (theta, pyramid, prism, turtle)-free graphs and derives a polynomial-time MWIS algorithm for (pyramid, even hole)-free graphs. The internal-ref contribution text referencing 'Conjecture 1.1' concerns a structural conjecture about separator counts in a different paper's numbering; the relevance to this open problem is the polynomial-time MWIS result for a strict subclass of even-hole-free graphs, not for the full class.

search_queries: maximum independent set even-hole-free graphs polynomial time algorithm 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025
even-hole-free graphs MIS complexity NP-hard polynomial Chudnovsky Thomassé Trotignon Vušković
tree independence number even-hole-free graphs MWIS polynomial Chudnovsky 2024 2025 arxiv
notes: The open problem (polynomial vs. NP-hard for MIS in even-hole-free graphs) is still open as of May 2026. The quasi-polynomial algorithm of arXiv:2407.08927 is the strongest known result for the full class. Both since_posted URLs were verified via WebFetch.
